Get in touch

Let's connect

Whether you have a tool you'd like us to review, found an error in an article, or want to discuss a partnership — we're here for it.

How can we help?

We are dedicated to providing honest, fluff-free AI tool recommendations for small business owners and freelancers. Here is what to expect when you contact us:

📬

Direct Email

hello@aitoolsidea.com

⚡

Fast Response Time

We read every email and typically reply within 24 business hours.

🤝

Partnerships & Advertising

We work with select SaaS brands that bring genuine value to our SMB audience.

Frequently asked

Can I pay for a top ranking?

No. Our rankings are strictly editorial and independent. We review tools based on rigorous real-world testing.

Send us a message

Fill out the form below and our editorial team will get back to you.

✨

Message received!

Thank you for reaching out. Your inquiry has been routed to our team, and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
